title: NotebookConnectionOutput
description:
Machine-readable form of [`NotebookConnection`] for `--format json`.

Mirrors the human-readable output. `compute_node` and `login_host` are the
resolved hosts used to render the tunnel hint; they are descriptive only —
nothing here opens a connection.

compute_node.description: Resolved compute node the server runs on.

next_commands.description: Suggested follow-up commands an agent can run next.

schema_version.description: Version of this output document's schema.

tunnel_hint.description: SSH tunnel hint, when one is needed.

url.description: The URL to open (localhost for Jupyter, scraped link for VS Code).
